task_completion.description: bcWebCam application is open and running.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bcWebCam application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: DataMatrix 2D barcode recognition is enabled in bcWebCam settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The settings or Barcode Options window in bcWebCam is open, and the checkbox for 'DataMatrix' is checked.

task_completion.description: The pharmaceutical barcode is successfully decoded by bcWebCam.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The raw GS1 string '01003000106332151726053110BXL99' is visible in the bcWebCam decoded results field.

task_completion.description: A text file named dscsa_log.txt is created in C:\workspace\.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., Notepad) is open with the title 'dscsa_log.txt', or the file is visible in the C:\workspace\ directory in File Explorer.

task_completion.description: The parsed GS1 data is written to the text file in the exact specified format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor shows the following exact lines: 'GTIN: 00300010633215', 'EXP: 260531', and 'LOT: BXL99'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the bcWebCam GUI to decode the barcode.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through bcWebCam settings and the camera feed decoding the barcode, rather than bypassing the app.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI text editor to create and save the log file.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor like Notepad should be visible with the typed contents, rather than terminal commands (like echo or Out-File) being used to generate the file.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely parsed the string from the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The parsed values in the text file must correspond to the raw GS1 string shown in the bcWebCam interface, proving the agent didn't just hallucinate the expected values.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
The expected raw GS1 string decoded by bcWebCam is '01003000106332151726053110BXL99'. The expected parsed values to be written in C:\workspace\dscsa_log.txt are:
GTIN: 00300010633215
EXP: 260531
LOT: BXL99
